name: Abinash Chaudhary
bio: Hi! I'm Abinash Chaudhary, but most people know me as Abhi. I'm a passionate and curious technology enthusiast from Kathmandu, Nepal. I enjoy transforming ideas into real-world applications through programming and continuously exploring new technologies. Learning is something I genuinely enjoy, and I'm always looking for ways to improve my skills.
fun_facts: Coffee is my favorite companion during coding sessions.
I love traveling and exploring new places whenever I get the opportunity.
I'm always excited to learn something new, whether it's a technology, skill, or interesting fact.
I enjoy performing stand-up comedy and making people laugh.
I love cracking jokes... and bones too. 😄
I enjoy combining creativity with technology to build useful and innovative projects.
goal: To become a highly skilled software engineer and AI developer by building innovative, user-friendly, and impactful applications that solve real-world problems.
motto: Keep learning, keep building, and never stop improving.

projects.name: Joya AI
projects.description: An intelligent conversational AI assistant with memory, PDF upload, voice, and multi-session chat support. Built with Node.js, Express, Groq API, and Supabase.

projects.name: Brew Haven
projects.description: A full-featured cafe web application with table reservations, dine-in ordering, cart management, and an admin dashboard. Built with React, TypeScript, and Supabase.
